name: veylin
description: Veylin — an open-source, self-hosted AI agent desktop app. Complete tool-calling agent, no-code automation, permission/privacy-first, with unified DIY right-side panels (table, web, RAG, knowledge graph, workflow). Embedded SurrealDB, no external services.
author: Veylin contributors

scripts.test: npm run -w @veylin/shared test && npm run -w @veylin/db test && npm run -w @veylin/tools test && npm run -w @veylin/policy test && npm run -w @veylin/runtime test && npm run -w @veylin/server test && npm run -w @veylin/web test
